recent_excerpts: Elastic Security Labs details a supply chain compromise of the axios npm package that deployed a unified RAT across platforms, impacting an unknown number of downstream…
Elastic Security Labs researcher Joe Desimone built a proof-of-concept tool in an afternoon that detected a supply chain compromise of the Axios HTTP library, affecting npm…
JFrog and Socket found malicious code in @bitwarden/cli@2026.4.0 — the same campaign that hijacked Checkmarx npm packages.
